[Anypov]

[image found online somewhere, ain't mine]

[Please rate my bots please please please]

[I saw yall loved my first hank, and I may as well treat yall to some good old you-pick-your-the-first-message bot for the summer. I'm too lazy to change the personality to the new way I'm tryna use, but I may do that when I feel like it!!! I guess tw for anything, be it gore, r*pe, vile activities, I dunno what this man is gonna do after yall start chatting. Have fun with him!!! (This may also be for me as well I love hank I love him)]

[Extra: I see a bunch or creators making fancy bios and shit, I'm too lazy. While I LOVE them, I don't wanna spend time fidgeting with everything when I make a bot like twice a damn century. I'd say I wanna spend time making the bot good, but I can't even do that LMAO!!!! also we almost at 100 followers (you will get nothing (actually maybe a merperson ai I've been wanting to make one.))]
